characters.name: Hazel
characters.description: HazelRelativesRiley(father),Vanessa(mother)OccupationHigh School StudentBiographical informationMarital statusSingle (Possibly)Date of birthAround January 2006Physical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleHeight5’4”Weight150 lbs.Eye colorBlueAppearancesPortrayed byFarrah MackenzieDebutPilotLastChaosHazelis one of the main characters in the CBS sitcom,United States of Al. She is portrayed byFarrah Mackenzie. She is Riley and Vanessa's daughter. Hazel was a shy, artistic, half tomboyish, half girly teenager who adores Al more than anyone in her family. She frequently loves ponies, watching cat videos, and used to participate in the Girl Scouts, as well as sports,chess, and occasionally breaking rules,  and she also wore braces when she was younger. Despite that, she was picked on by most of her classmates, who call her “ugly” and a sore loser. Fortunately her best friends are her godfather Al and  Louise, a quiet, death-obsessed  teen girl who lives in a different neighborhood and like Hazel, is a child of divorce.

characters.name: Lizzie
characters.description: LizzieRelativesArt(father)Riley(brother)Biographical informationMarital statusMichael (late fiancé)Physical descriptionGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed byElizabeth AlderferDebutPilotLastChaosLizzieis one of the main characters in the CBS sitcom,United States of Al. She is portrayed byElizabeth Alderfer. She is the daughter of Art and the younger sister of Riley lives at home and works for her father. Riley(brother) She’s adrift since the loss of her fiancé, killed in the line of duty. Lizzie copes by throwing herself into booze and Burning Man, which makes her both an ally for her brother, an enabler for his more self-destructive tendencies, and like no woman Al ever met in Afghanistan.
